---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CSP
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or gap you're experiencing.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which layer would this belong in?

- [ ] `csp-meta` (methodology skills)
- [ ] `csp-workflow` (project management workflows)
- [ ] `csp-spec` (spec-driven development)
- [ ] `csp-patterns` (language/framework patterns)
- [ ] `csp-runtime` (runtime agents/commands)
- [ ] `csp-router` (routing/triggers)
- [ ] Not sure

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
